---
layout: cv
title: Logan Smith's CV
---
# Logan Smith
Computer Science Student.

<div id="webaddress">
<a href="smi23136@byui.edu">smi23136@byui.edu</a>
| <a href="https://logansmith9454.github.io/datascience_portfolio/gh-pages/resume.pdf">Download PDF</a>
| <a href="https://github.com/byuidatascience/datascience_portfolio/blob/gh-pages/resume.pdf">Download PDF</a>
</div>


## Currently

Junior Computer Science major with an emphasis in machine learning at Brigham Young University - Idaho.

### Specialized in

Python, C#.


### Research interests

Data structures, optimization.


## Education

`2024-present`
__Brigham Young University-Idaho__


## Occupation

`2023-present`
__MantisTech LLC__, Oswego, Illinois

- Shot detection troubleshooter


<!-- ### Footer

Last updated: May 2013 -->
